summary: Parses a content disposition header value into a normalized object or throws when the value is missing, malformed, or contains duplicate parameters.
signature_intent: Accepts one required string containing a disposition type with optional parameters, and returns a parsed representation.
behavior: Requires the input to be a non-empty string.
Validates the leading disposition type syntax.
Normalizes the disposition type to lowercase.
Parses semicolon-delimited parameters after the type.
Unquotes quoted parameter values and removes escape markers.
Decodes extended parameter values marked with a trailing asterisk.
Extended parameter values take precedence over regular values with the same base name.
Returns an object containing the normalized type and parsed parameters.
edge_cases: Throws TypeError when the input is missing, empty, or not a string.
Throws TypeError when the disposition type syntax is invalid.
Throws TypeError when parameter text is malformed or has unexpected gaps.
Throws TypeError when the same parameter name appears more than once.
Allows a trailing semicolon after the disposition type before parameters.
Ignores a regular parameter if an extended value for the same base name was already parsed.
forbidden_details: Does not specify internal variable names, source locations, repository names, or parser implementation details.
